mapper.select: SELECT YEAR(create_time) AS year, MONTH(create_time) AS month, COUNT(CASE WHEN upload_result IN ('3', '4') THEN 1 END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN upload_result = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submit_number, SUM(CASE WHEN upload_result = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_number FROM xml_file WHERE deleted = 0 and is_latest = 1 AND create_time >= CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())), '-01-01') AND create_time < CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())) + 1, '-01-01') GROUP BY YEAR(create_time), MONTH(create_time) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC

SELECT YEAR(update_time) AS year, MONTH(update_time) AS month, COUNT(CASE WHEN validate_result IN (1, 2) THEN 1 END) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN validate_result = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_number, SUM(CASE WHEN validate_result = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_number FROM xml_file WHERE deleted = 0 and is_latest = 1 and update_time is not null AND update_time >= CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())), '-01-01') AND update_time < CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())) + 1, '-01-01') GROUP BY YEAR(update_time), MONTH(update_time) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC;

SELECT YEAR(create_time) AS year, MONTH(create_time) AS month, sdd.dict_label AS vehicle_model, COUNT(*) AS total FROM xml_file xf left join (select dict_code, dict_label, dict_value from sys_dict_data where dict_type = 'vehicle_model') sdd on xf.model_code = sdd.dict_code WHERE deleted = 0 and is_latest = 1
AND create_time >= CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())), '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), '-01') AND create_time < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())), '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0'), '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND create_time >= CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())), '-01-01') AND create_time < CONCAT(IFNULL(#{year}, YEAR(NOW())) + 1, '-01-01')
GROUP BY YEAR(create_time), MONTH(create_time), model_code ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC, model_code ASC;
